task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with /home/user/Documents/chorale.mscz — 4 measures of quarter notes in C major 4/4.

Export the score to both of these formats at exactly these paths:
- PNG Images: /home/user/Documents/chorale.png
- Standard MIDI File: /home/user/Documents/chorale.mid

The original /home/user/Documents/chorale.mscz must still exist. The PNG must have a valid PNG header, and the MIDI must contain at least 4 notes.

verification.description: Exported chorale.png exists with valid PNG header
